title: podman container prune -f fails with Error: unmarshalling into &[]*reports.PruneReport
body:
### Issue Description

podman container prune -f fails with **Error: unmarshalling into &[]*reports.PruneReport**

```
Error: unmarshalling into &[]*reports.PruneReport{(*reports.PruneReport)(0xc0001941b0),
 (*reports.PruneReport)(0xc0001942a0),
 (*reports.PruneReport)(0xc0001942d0)},
 data "[{\"Id\":\"c5e8a0476dcbfe4dc368b282a0e177f6c5c3d7b4edb1576a28749431dc988fa8\",
\"Err\":\"container c5e8a0476dcbfe4dc368b282a0e177f6c5c3d7b4edb1576a28749431dc988fa8 has dependent containers which must be removed before it: 
4a9b89cffde83dcf1e88e306ad278cdff93e845e2b1734785cc2583a3f700c97,
 1296f09aaaf0616f5d09ee76bd2a3f1d667e30d0a6e4f2adb4c9a93551de4eee: container already exists\",
\"Size\":0},
{\"Id\":\"4a9b89cffde83dcf1e88e306ad278cdff93e845e2b1734785cc2583a3f700c97\",
\"Err\":\"container 4a9b89cffde83dcf1e88e306ad278cdff93e845e2b1734785cc2583a3f700c97 has dependent containers which must be removed before it: 
1296f09aaaf0616f5d09ee76bd2a3f1d667e30d0a6e4f2adb4c9a93551de4eee: container already exists\",
\"Size\":0},
{\"Id\":\"1296f09aaaf0616f5d09ee76bd2a3f1d667e30d0a6e4f2adb4c9a93551de4eee\",
\"Size\":11468}]\n": json: cannot unmarshal string into Go struct field PruneReport.Err of type error
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

`docker compose up` using docker-compose.yml file having multiple services, some that depend on others.
podman container prune -f

### Describe the results you received

Error: unmarshalling into &[]*reports.PruneReport{(*reports.PruneReport)(0xc0001941b0),
 (*reports.PruneReport)(0xc0001942a0),
 (*reports.PruneReport)(0xc0001942d0)},
 data "[{\"Id\":\"c5e8a0476dcbfe4dc368b282a0e177f6c5c3d7b4edb1576a28749431dc988fa8\",
\"Err\":\"container c5e8a0476dcbfe4dc368b282a0e177f6c5c3d7b4edb1576a28749431dc988fa8 has dependent containers which must be removed before it: 
4a9b89cffde83dcf1e88e306ad278cdff93e845e2b1734785cc2583a3f700c97,
 1296f09aaaf0616f5d09ee76bd2a3f1d667e30d0a6e4f2adb4c9a93551de4eee: container already exists\",
\"Size\":0},
{\"Id\":\"4a9b89cffde83dcf1e88e306ad278cdff93e845e2b1734785cc2583a3f700c97\",
\"Err\":\"container 4a9b89cffde83dcf1e88e306ad278cdff93e845e2b1734785cc2583a3f700c97 has dependent containers which must be removed before it: 
1296f09aaaf0616f5d09ee76bd2a3f1d667e30d0a6e4f2adb4c9a93551de4eee: container already exists\",
\"Size\":0},
{\"Id\":\"1296f09aaaf0616f5d09ee76bd2a3f1d667e30d0a6e4f2adb4c9a93551de4eee\",
\"Size\":11468}]\n": json: cannot unmarshal string into Go struct field PruneReport.Err of type error

### Describe the results you expected

All containers to be be removed.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
